{{Quote|Civilization. Well, Hyllyard City, anyway, which is about as close as this part of the planet gets to it.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]|<ref name="HTTE" />}}
'''Hyllyard City''' was a small frontier town and the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]], which also served as the commercial hub and largest urban settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Layout==
{{Quote|There's really only one practical choice. A town called Hyllyard City, on the edge of the forest and almost directly along their path. It's the only population center anywhere for more than a hundred kilometers.|[[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] on [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="HTTE" />}}
Hyllyard City was located on the edge of a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] and accessible across the planet's plains, and was the only population center for more than a hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] in any direction.<ref name="HTTE" /> A frontier port town, Hyllyard consisted of a number of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] landing pits and numerous makeshift structures home to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] settlers.<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Its small houses and commercial buildings were crammed tightly together between narrow streets, while several wider avenues radiated outwards from the town center, like the spokes of a wheel. The center contained an open village square, measuring a fifteen-meter expanse, marked by a large, gray archway reaching ten meters high.<ref name="HTTE" />

==History==
Hyllyard was colonized during the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It remained the largest center of activity on the planet despite not being very popular, and was home to a relatively small amount of settlers.<ref name="CSWE" /> The unobtrusive port town became a haven for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and other malcontents,<ref name="DB">{{DB|location|myrkr|Myrkr}}</ref> including fugitives, as well as traders.<ref name="CSWE" />

Five years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], during the era of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Hyllyard was garrisoned by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] forces.<ref name="HTTE" /> The city remained a haven until the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], when Myrkr was conquered and sundered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="DB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hyllyard City was named by author [[Timothy Zahn]] after Ken and Denise Hillyard.<ref name="HTTE20">''[[Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition]]''</ref>
